hook.text: Some numbers can't be written as fractions. The ancient Greeks were horrified.

buildup.text: The square root of 2 was the first known irrational. Its decimals never end or repeat.

discovery.text: Legend says the Pythagorean who proved it was thrown overboard for disturbing cosmic order.

twist.text: Irrational numbers aren't rare. They vastly outnumber the rationals on the number line.

climax.text: Pi, e, and the square root of every non-perfect square are all irrational.

punchline.text: Most numbers on the line can never be written as fractions.

quiz.question: What makes a number irrational?
options: It cannot be expressed as a fraction
